chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-617 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For order on MA No.997/2025. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Ghulam Sarwar Baloch, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petitioner was presented on 07.04.2021 and it was once fixed in Court on 06.05.2021 when subject to maintainability, notice was issued to the respondent No.2 and A.A.G. Thereafter the petitioner has failed to pursue his petition even he did not attempt to fix the matter before Court. It shows that the petitioner has lost his interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
